properties.code:
{
          Row() {
            Text($r('app.string.personal_info'))
              .fontSize($r('sys.float.ohos_id_text_size_headline8'))
              .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
          }
          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
          .height(56)

          Row() {
            Text($r('app.string.mobile_number'))
              .fontSize($r('sys.float.ohos_id_text_size_sub_title2'))
              .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)

            Text(this.anonymousPhone)
              .fontSize($r('sys.float.ohos_id_text_size_sub_title3'))
              .fontColor($r('sys.color.ohos_id_color_text_secondary'))
          }
          .width('100%')
          .height(56)
          .padding({
            left: 12,
            right: 12,
            top: 4,
            bottom: 4
          })
          .margin({ top: 12 })
          .backgroundColor(Color.White)
          .justifyContent(FlexAlign.SpaceBetween)
          .borderRadius(20)
        }

properties.comment: Key value of the link to the HUAWEI ID User Authentication Agreement.File used to configure the link to the HUAWEI ID User Authentication Agreement.Change the link to that of your own privacy policy....Change the link to that of your own privacy policy....Users need to accept relevant agreements before they can sign in wth HUAWEI IDs. Set the agreement status to NOT_ACCEPTED first. Once the user accepts the agreements, change the agreement status to ACCEPTED to complete HUAWEI ID sign-in.Process the logic of a tap on the one-tap sign-in button.Specify whether to accept the agreements.Specify whether to display a message asking the user to accept the agreements.Variable that determines whether the agreement and checkbox are unavailable for tapping during the sign-in process.Processing logic returned after a gesture operation is executed.Method that processes a tap on the one-tap sign-in button.If the agreements are not accepted, a pop-up message is displayed.After sign-in to the app is successful, process the server sign-in execution logic here.After sign-in on the server is successful, the data to be displayed on the main screen is returned....In this example, after a successful sign-in, the personal information screen is displayed.If the agreements are not accepted, a pop-up message is displayed.In app sign-in scenarios involving UI interactions, it is recommended to guide users with the following error code prompts:The user has not signed in with a HUAWEI ID. Use a HUAWEI ID to sign in and try again, or sign in to the app in another way.Network exception. Check the current network status and try again, or sign in to the app in another way.Sign-in failed. Try another sign-in option.The user cancels the authorization.System service exception. Try again later or sign in to the app in another way.The user does not accept the agreements.Repeated request. No further action is needed.Sign-in failed. Try another sign-in option.Redirect to the HUAWEI ID User Authentication Agreement page.Obtain the multi-language environment information of the system.Concatenate link parameters.Obtain the privacy policy address from rawfile.Read files from /AppScope/resources/rawfile.Return the link to the HUAWEI ID User Authentication Agreement.Back button.App icon.Mobile number and its description.One-tap sign-in.Set the agreement status to ACCEPTED.Set the agreement status to NOT_ACCEPTED.
